channel.title: Discord on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Discord on Arrans github.io

item.title: 42wim/matterbridge
item.description: bridge between mattermost, IRC, gitter, xmpp, slack, discord, telegram, rocketchat, twitch, ssh-chat, zulip, whatsapp, keybase, matrix, microsoft teams, nextcloud, mumble, vk and more with REST API (mattermost not required!)

item.title: spacebarchat/server
item.description: Spacebar server - A reimplementation of the Discord.com backend, built with Typescript and love

item.title: SwiftcordApp/Swiftcord
item.description: A fully native Discord client for macOS built 100% in Swift!
